name: Nidhoggmon

signature_move.name: Annihilention
signature_move.description: Fires red-hot beams from its eyes.

description: A colossal Digimon that takes vast amounts of energy into its body, and is in a constant state of thermal runaway . The light emitted from its wings indicates what stage of thermal runaway it is in; the more it approaches the danger level, the redder it becomes. Nidhoggmon repeatedly destroys and absorbs things, leaving nothing behind in its wake. Its Special Moves are firing red-hot beams from its eyes ( Annihilention ), and condensing the energy within its body, and breathing it out of its mouth in the form of a wave ( Rudiment ).
